creator: dbaio@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 178949
py-phply-1.0.0.patch

- Update to 1.0.0
- Remove Python 2.7 limitation
- Remove LICENSE_FILE

Changelog:

- Add finally, heredoc, nowdoc, trait, static expression, binary numbers,
  yield support
- Fix various array constructs
- Add commandline tools
- All changes tested on Travis
- Accept mixed case open tag

[Q/A]

portlint: OK (looks fine.)

testport:
   poudriere: i386|amd64 - 10.3 p15     (OK)
   poudriere: i386|amd64 - 11   p6      (OK)
   poudriere: i386|amd64 - 12   r311844 (OK)
